content: Operator builds infrastructure the agent doesn't know about. Before declaring infrastructure is missing or proposing new components, search the repo for existing analogs. Example redirect: agent claimed the validator had no image-reuse checks; operator's response was 'there is already an image tracker somewhere I thought.' On inspection: assets/data/atribution_registry.json + assets/data/ship-image-catalog.json + admin/audit-ship-images.js + admin/IMAGE_ATTRIBUTION_TRACKING.md all existed. The correct move is to AUGMENT existing artifacts, not build parallel ones. ls admin/ | grep -i <topic> before proposing any 'new' tool.
